easy.title: Palindrome & Truthiness Checker
easy.description: Write a function `is_palindrome(text)` that returns `True` if the string is a palindrome (reads same forwards and backwards, case-insensitive, ignoring spaces).
hints: Filter out non-alphanumeric characters with c.isalnum()

medium.title: String Compression (RLE)
medium.description: Implement Run-Length Encoding: convert 'aabcccccaaa' into 'a2b1c5a3'. If compressed string is not shorter, return original.
hints: Iterate through indices from 1 to len(s)
Use a list to collect parts and join at the end

hard.title: Valid Password Validator
hard.description: Write `validate_password(pwd)` returning `(is_valid: bool, issues: list)`. Password must have min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, 1 special char (`!@#$%^&*`).
hints: Check each requirement independently and collect error messages

debugging.title: Fix String Mutability Bug
debugging.description: Fix the function trying to capitalize vowels in a string.
bugs: Strings are immutable in Python; `s[i] = ...` throws TypeError. Rebuild using list and `join()`.
